operations.notes:
Only users who have access to the containing ticket can download the attached file.
If a file is not yet attached to a ticket, only the user who uploaded the file can download it.
The name of the downloaded file is returned in the Filename field of the content-disposition header.
The file content is returned in the response body.

responseMessages.message: You do not have permission to download this attachment. Contact your administrator for assistance
There is no attachment with uuid: <UUID>

operations.summary: Upload a file to attach to a ticket
operations.notes:
Upload a file that can then be attached to new or existing ticket.
This operation requires permission to create or to handle a ticket. Once uploaded, use the tickets operations to attach the uploaded file.
Maximum size of file attachments: 10Mb.
The post must contain a multi-part form with form-data, named 'attachment', containing the contents of the file to be attached. See the example below

responseMessages.message: File name: <FILE NAME> contains the following invalid characters: <CHARACTERS>. Enter a value that uses alphanumeric characters, digits, spaces, or any of the following characters: : + - _ # @ . : / = ! ^ ( ) ,
